THE LAW OF MOORE WILL STOP SPECULATION ***  
THE LAW OF MOORE WILL STOP SPECULATION IS A MYTH, FOR IT IS A LAW THAT HAS BEEN VALID FOR DECADES AND WILL CONTINUE TO BE VALID IN THE FUTURE. THE LAW OF MOORE IS A REFERENCE TO THE RATE OF INCREASE IN PROCESSING POWER PER UNIT OF AREA ON A CHIP, WHICH HAS BEEN THE BASIS FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF INTEGRATED CIRCUITS AND HAS BEEN A KEY FACTOR IN THE INNOVATION OF TECHNOLOGY. THE LAW OF MOORE IS NOT A LAW THAT WILL STOP SPECULATION, BUT A LAW THAT WILL CONTINUE TO GUIDE THE DEVELOPMENT OF TECHNOLOGY FOR THE FUTURE.
